announcements.description: List a company's regulatory corporate announcements filed with BSE, newest first, with attachment metadata.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

from_date.description: Earliest announcement date as YYYYMMDD; empty means no lower bound.

page.description: One-based results page from BSE's own pagination.

scrip_code.description: Exact numeric BSE scrip code such as 500325 for Reliance Industries.

to_date.description: Latest announcement date as YYYYMMDD; empty means no upper bound.

items.description: Announcements, newest first, as BSE returns them.

announced_at.description: Announcement timestamp as BSE reports it.

attachment_pdf.description: Attachment file name under bseindia.com's AttachLive directory, when a PDF exists.

attachment_size_bytes.description: Attachment size in bytes when BSE reports it.

category.description: BSE announcement category such as AGM/EGM or Result.

scrip_code.description: Numeric BSE scrip code of the filer.

pagination.behavior: Increase page until BSE returns an empty Table.

announcements.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for live share prices or company identity; use quote for those.
announcements.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs a listed company's recent BSE filings such as board meeting outcomes, AGM notices, or regulation disclosures.

quote.description: Read a listed company's identity, live price, and market header data from BSE by scrip code.

scrip_code.description: Exact numeric BSE scrip code such as 500325 for Reliance Industries.

change.description: Absolute price change for the day.

change_percent.description: Percentage price change for the day.

price.description: Last traded price in rupees as BSE reports it.

short_name.description: BSE short name for the company.

quote.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for regulatory filings; use announcements for those.
quote.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs a company's current BSE price, change, group, or index membership from its scrip code.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
human_boundaries: Broker, member, and listing-centre services require BSE member credentials that this mapping does not hold.
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.
